title: rclaude project configuration
description: Per-project configuration for rclaude sessions. Place at .claude/rclaude.json in your project root.

permissions.description: Auto-approve rules for Claude Code tool permission requests. Matched permissions are approved by the wrapper without reaching the dashboard.

additionalProperties.description: Rules for a specific tool (e.g. Write, Edit, Read, Bash, Glob, Grep)

oneOf.description: true = auto-approve all invocations of this tool
Glob patterns to match against. For file tools (Write, Edit, Read, Glob, Grep): matches relative file paths. For Bash: matches the full command string. Use ** for recursive directory matching.
